achievements.description: Beat Bowser in Story Mode on Intense difficulty

achievements.title: Super Player

achievements.title: Story Mode Superstar
achievements.description: Get an S Rank on all five boards in Story Mode on Hard difficulty or above, in one playthrough

achievements.title: Free for All Champ
achievements.description: Win a free-for-all Mini-Game Battle set to five wins against 3 Hard difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: There's an I in This Team
achievements.description: Win a 1 vs. 3 Mini-Game Battle set to five wins against 3 Hard difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: If You're Not First, You're Last
achievements.description: Cross the finish line first in a Mini-Game Circuit against 3 Hard difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Decathlete
achievements.description: Win a Mini-Game Decathlon against 3 Hard difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: Win a Mini-Game Decathlon against 3 Hard difficulty CPUs without ever being lower than first place
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Winner Winner Toadstool Dinner
achievements.description: Win a Mini-Game Tournament against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: True Dinger
achievements.description: Have a score of 25 or higher in Dinger Derby
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Math League
achievements.description: Collect 25 or more coins in Mathletes as the solo player

achievements.title: Raining Coins
achievements.description: Collect 20 or more coins in Coin Cache
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Mr. and Mrs. Koopa
achievements.description: Grab 3 golden flowers in Flower Shower against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs

achievements.title: Luckiest of them All
achievements.description: Get 200 points or higher in Lucky Lineup

achievements.title: Crystal Hoarder
achievements.description: Gather all 5 crystals in Frozen Frenzy against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Sky Tank
achievements.description: Beat a Hard or higher difficulty CPU in Sky Survivors without taking damage in free play only
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Toy Dream
achievements.description: Win on the Toy Dream board in Party Mode against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs (Must be done in one session, with turns set to 20 or higher and other mini-game settings on default)
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.description: Ride the train on the Toy Dream board

achievements.description: Ride the slide on the Rainbow Dream board

achievements.description: Visit Monty Mole on the Pirate Dream board

achievements.title: Ray of Sunshine
achievements.description: Catch a ride on a Manta Ray on the Underwater Dream board

achievements.description: Play the slots on the Future Dream board
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Happy Birthday to Me
achievements.description: Celebrate your birthday on the Sweet Dream board
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Escaped
achievements.description: Escape from Bowser's Circle on the Bowser's Nightmare board
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Capsuleless Victory
achievements.description: Complete any board without using capsules against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs (Must be done in one session, with turns set to 20 or higher and other mini-game settings on default)

achievements.title: Coin Massacre
achievements.description: Use a Paratroopa capsule to make your opponents lose 50 coins total
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Chaos Is Power Enriched by the Heart
achievements.description: Use a Chance capsule
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Koopa Stockpile
achievements.description: Use a Koopa Bank capsule and gain 25 or more coins from it
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Feeling Nice
achievements.description: Throw a Wiggler capsule on the board
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Wiggler Fishing
achievements.description: Use a Lakitu capsule to steal an opponent's Wiggler capsule
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Where's F.L.U.D.D.?
achievements.description: Purchase all of the E. Gadd parts in Super Duel Mode

achievements.description: Unlock Donkey Kong and purchase all of his parts in Super Duel Mode

achievements.title: Smartest Star
achievements.description: Purchase all of the Skolar parts after beating all Super Duel Mode modes on all difficulties
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Punch the Wall
achievements.description: Purchase the Bowser Punch and Bob-omb Wall after purchasing every other machine part
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Gotta Know When to Hold 'Em
achievements.description: Win a game of Card Party by having the most stars on a standard difficulty board or harder
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: No Ztars Allowed
achievements.description: Hold onto 6 stars at any point in a game of Card Party against 3 CPUs
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Against All Odds
achievements.description: Get all 3 bonus stars in Party Mode against 3 Hard or higher difficulty CPUs (Must be done in one session, with turns set to 20 or higher and other mini-game settings on default)
achievements.author: s0uth

achievements.title: Mini-Game Collector
achievements.description: Unlock every mini-game
achievements.author: s0uth
